Footer.companyDescription: Bangladesh’s trusted marketplace for buying and selling everything—from electronics and vehicles to property and services.

About.heroSubtitle: Becheden is a trusted online marketplace where people can easily buy and sell new, used, and pre-owned products. We are building a smart community that helps items find new value instead of becoming waste.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To create Bangladesh’s most reliable online marketplace where anyone can easily sell unused items and buyers can find quality products at affordable prices. We aim to make trading simple, fast, and secure for everyone.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: A future where every product gets reused, every purchase is more sustainable, and online trading helps reduce unnecessary waste while supporting a circular economy in Bangladesh.

community.title: Our Community
community.description: Becheden is more than a marketplace — it’s a growing community of trusted buyers and sellers. We focus on safety, transparency, and convenience so everyone can trade with confidence.

About.missionDesc: To create Bangladesh’s most reliable online marketplace where anyone can easily sell unused items and buyers can find quality products at affordable prices. We aim to make trading simple, fast, and secure for everyone.
About.visionDesc: A future where every product gets reused, every purchase is more sustainable, and online trading helps reduce unnecessary waste while supporting a circular economy in Bangladesh.
About.communityDesc: Becheden is more than a marketplace — it’s a growing community of trusted buyers and sellers. We focus on safety, transparency, and convenience so everyone can trade with confidence.
About.storyPara1: Becheden was created with a simple idea — to make buying and selling easier for everyone in Bangladesh. What started as a small concept has now grown into a platform where thousands of users connect every day to exchange valuable items.
About.storyPara2: We help people turn unused products into opportunities while giving buyers access to affordable and quality goods. Together, we are building a smarter and more sustainable way of trading.
About.ctaSubtitle: Join Becheden today and be part of a smarter, simpler, and more sustainable way of trading.

Contact.heroSubtitle: Have questions or need assistance? Our team is here to help you. Reach out to us and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
Contact.infoSubtitle: Fill out the form or use our contact details to get in touch with our team.

Contact.successMessage: Thank you! We have received your message. We will contact you soon.
Contact.errorMessage: Sorry, your message could not be sent. Please try again later.

FAQ.heroSubtitle: Find answers to common questions about buying, selling, and staying safe on Becheden. We’re here to make your experience simple, smooth, and secure.
FAQ.sellQ: How do I sell an item on Becheden?
FAQ.sellAns: Simply create an account, click on “Post Ad”, add clear details about your item, upload photos, set your price, and publish your listing. Your item will be visible to potential buyers instantly.
FAQ.feeQ: Is there a fee to post an ad?
FAQ.feeAns: Basic listings on Becheden are free of charge. However, we may offer premium or featured listing options for better visibility.
FAQ.contactQ: How can I contact a seller?
FAQ.contactAns: You can contact sellers directly through the built-in chat or contact options available on each listing page.
FAQ.prohibitedAns:
Becheden does not allow illegal, unsafe, or restricted items. This includes:
- Illegal goods or services
- Offensive or harmful content
- Any items that violate local laws or regulations
- Stolen or counterfeit products
FAQ.suspiciousQ: How do I report a suspicious ad?
FAQ.suspiciousAns: If you find a suspicious listing, click the “Report” button on the ad page or contact our support team immediately. We will review and take action quickly.
FAQ.editQ: Can I edit my ad after posting?
FAQ.editAns: Yes, you can edit your listing anytime from your account dashboard to update details, price, or images.
FAQ.footerSubtitle: If you couldn't find the answer you were looking for, please feel free to contact our support team or check our safety guidelines.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.priority: At Becheden, protecting your personal data is one of our highest priorities.
Privacy.sec1Text: When you use Becheden, we collect certain information to provide, improve, and secure our services.
Privacy.sec2Text: We use your information to ensure a safe, smooth, and efficient marketplace experience.
Privacy.sec3Text: We implement modern security measures, including encryption and monitoring systems, to protect your personal data.    However, please note that no online platform or data transmission method is completely 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
Privacy.sec4Text: You have full control over your personal data on Becheden. You may request to:
Privacy.sec4Item1: Update or correct your personal information
Privacy.sec4Item2: Delete your account or stored data
Privacy.sec4Item3: Withdraw consent for data usage (where applicable)
Privacy.footerSubtitle: If you have any questions regarding your privacy or data security, please contact our support team. We are committed to keeping your information safe and transparent.

Terms.title: Terms & Conditions
Terms.priority: Please read our terms carefully before using our services
Terms.sec1Text: By accessing or using Becheden, you agree to comply with and be legally bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you should not use our platform.
Terms.sec2Text: To ensure a safe and trusted marketplace experience, all users must follow these rules:
Terms.sec2Item2: Do not list or sell illegal, restricted, or prohibited items
Terms.sec2Item3: Treat other users with respect and professionalism
Terms.sec2Item4: Follow all platform safety and community guidelines
Terms.sec3Text: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials, including your password.
Terms.sec3Item1: Do not share your account with others
Terms.sec3Item2: Notify us immediately if you suspect unauthorized access
Terms.sec3Item3: Be responsible for all activities under your account
Terms.sec4Text: Users are fully responsible for the content they post on Becheden.The following content is strictly prohibited:
Terms.sec4Item4: Spam, malicious links, or harmful promotions
Terms.sec4ItemDesc: We reserve the right to remove any content that violates these rules.
Terms.sec5Text: Becheden acts only as a platform connecting buyers and sellers.We are not responsible for:
Terms.sec5Item2: Disputes, losses, or damages arising from user interactions
Terms.sec5ItemDesc: Users engage in transactions at their own risk.
Terms.footerSubtitle: If you have any questions or concerns regarding these Terms, please contact our support team. We are here to help you.

Safety.heroSubtitle: At Becheden, we are committed to creating a safe, trusted, and secure marketplace for all users. Follow these safety guidelines to ensure a smooth and risk-free trading experience.

public.title: Meet in Public Places
public.desc: Always choose busy, well-lit public places for transactions.

friend.title: Bring Someone with You
friend.desc: Whenever possible, take a friend or family member with you or inform someone about your meeting location and time.

inspect.title: Inspect Before You Pay
inspect.desc: Carefully check the item’s condition, quality, and authenticity before making any payment.

payment.title: Use Safe Payment Methods
payment.desc: Avoid sharing sensitive financial details or using untraceable payment methods. Choose secure and reliable payment options.

gut.title: Trust Your Instincts
gut.desc: If something feels suspicious or too good to be true, it’s better to avoid the deal and stay cautious.

verified.title: Prefer Verified Users
verified.desc: Whenever possible, deal with users who have verified profiles, ratings, and transaction history.

Safety.reportingDesc: If you notice any suspicious activity, fake listings, or unsafe behavior, report it immediately.We take all reports seriously and act quickly to protect our community.
Safety.emergencyDesc: If you ever face an urgent or dangerous situation, please contact local authorities immediately.
